summary: Backend P0 pre-launch hardening verified end-to-end. All 20 pytest assertions passed: 9 leaked test/beta codes correctly rejected as invalid, hidden OFH_INTERNAL_$1 coupon overrides cart to $1.00 with proper message, WELCOME10 (10%) and SoulX1079 (15%) regressions intact, BOOK10 min_quantity=5 enforced correctly (qty=3 blocked, qty=5 allowed), WELCOME10 has no spend_cap and applies full 10% on $1000 cart, admin /harden-test-coupons endpoint returns disabled_count>=9 and internal_test_coupon_code='OFH_INTERNAL_$1' (idempotent), admin /admin/{code}/toggle correctly flips active state with downstream validate reflecting the change, PWA manifest.json returns 200 with correct content-type and contains name='Soul Food', short_name='SOFU', display='standalone' and 8 icons, service-worker.js returns 200 with application/javascript content-type, index.html contains both <link rel='manifest'> and apple-mobile-web-app meta tags.
critical_code_review_comments: coupon_routes.py is 688 lines — borderline; consider splitting hardening helpers into a separate module if more pre-launch logic is added.
Login endpoint uses 'identifier' field (not 'email'); test_credentials.md and any client docs should note this for clarity (no functional issue, just doc hint).
test_credentials: Admin overflowharvest@gmail.com / Admin123! works via {identifier,password} login body. JWT returned with role=admin.
seed_data_creation: None. Toggle test re-enables WELCOME10 at end to leave DB in original state.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Login endpoint expects 'identifier' (not 'email'). Public coupon validate uses POST /api/coupons/validate with {code, cart_total, quantity}. Admin endpoints: POST /api/coupons/admin/harden-test-coupons and POST /api/coupons/admin/{code}/toggle with body {active: bool}. PWA assets live at root: /manifest.json and /service-worker.js — index.html ships with manifest link + apple-mobile-web-app meta tags.
